name: Lawn Agent — Phoenix AZ & Dallas TX

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'google/gemini-2.5-flash', response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a property analyst. Look at this satellite image of a US residential property. Classify: lawnCondition (dead/patchy/healthy/no-visible-lawn), lawnConfidence (0-1 float), houseQualityTier (A/B/C where A=large well-maintained home), standaloneHouse (boolean). Return JSON only.' }, { role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'text', text: 'Classify this property.' }, { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' + $binary.data.data } } ] } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [ { parts: [ { text: 'Replace the dead or patchy brown lawn with a lush, thick, evenly green healthy lawn. Keep the house, driveway, trees, fencing and all other elements identical. Photoreal satellite top-down view, same lighting and perspective.' }, { inline_data: { mime_type: 'image/jpeg', data: $binary.data.data } } ] } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ to: { firstName: $json.ownerName, addressLine1: $json.address, city: $json.city, provinceOrState: $json.state, postalOrZip: String($json.postcode), countryCode: 'US' }, size: '6x9', frontHTML: '', backHTML: '

We noticed your lawn needs attention — here is what it could look like. Scan for a free quote.

' }) }}
